abstract: See the full JSON code from this tutorial.
overview:
## Overview

This page brings together all of the Apple News Format features from this tutorial as a template that you can use for your News articles. If you followed the steps throughout this tutorial, the following example code should match the code in your `article.json` file.

You can copy or download this template (which is also the `article.json` file in `News_Design_Tutorial_6_Embeds`) and modify it to create your own News articles. See [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/setting-up-the-introductory-tutorial#Download-the-Article-Bundle-Examples]. To preview this article, see [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/setting-up-the-introductory-tutorial#Preview-the-Article-Bundle-Examples].

### Previous

[doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/adding-a-podcast]

### Next

[doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNews/setting-up-the-advanced-tutorials]

items.description: Download the tutorial files, and learn about what you’ll create in the introductory tutorial.
items.name: Setting Up the Introductory Tutorial

items.description: Create an article with text components and component text styles.
items.name: Creating Your First Article

items.description: Adjust the positions of the text components in your article—for example, place the article body off-center.
items.name: Positioning Text Components

items.description: Create a horizontal, styled divider that extends to the right edge of the display.
items.name: Adding a Divider

items.description: Create a photo that extends to both edges of the display, with captions that appear in the article layout and in full-screen view.
items.name: Adding an Image and Captions

items.description: Break an existing body component into two components, and then insert a pull quote between them.
items.name: Adding a Pull Quote

items.description: Display three images as a sequential gallery.
items.name: Adding a Gallery of Images

items.description: Display five images as mosaic tiles.
items.name: Adding a Mosaic of Images

items.description: Include a tweet in an article.
items.name: Adding a Tweet

items.description: Add a link to a podcast that displays the podcast artwork and the podcast show or episode information.
items.name: Adding a Podcast

title: Viewing the Finished Article for the Introductory Design Tutorial
